name: Indoor Courts At SSC The Dome
description:
Welcome to The Dome!   Our indoor facility houses 4 indoor basketball courts that we convert to recreation pickle ball courts during the day time hours.  Our facility has plenty of room for play and also and indoor rubberized track that can be utilized for warm up or additional exercise!  
The Dome has locker rooms to be able to change and shower facilities as well.   The Dome also has a concessions area with snacks and drinks available.

name: Regis Perry Memorial Park
description:
All skill levels welcomed. Play occurs when weather permitting. Many times we have 8-32 people playing with a rack system that encourages and allows for court turnover for waiting players.

Perry TWP Parks is currently investigating adding additional courts with indoor restrooms and concessions that will be available when used by Baseball and Softball leagues.
